llama_cpp._notes: Vulkan Windows x64 build. Vulkan covers NVIDIA, AMD, and Intel GPUs from a single binary; see Phase 3 for the n-gpu-layers wiring.

whisper_cpp._notes: fetch_bundled_assets.py pattern-matches the Windows x64 asset name (substring 'bin'); tag pin is sufficient. The HuggingFace metadata lookup still points at 'ggerganov/whisper.cpp' because the HF model repo did not move when the GitHub source moved to ggml-org.

piper._notes: rhasspy/piper was archived 2025-10-06. The 2023.11.14-2 release assets remain hosted on GitHub indefinitely. Active development continues at OHF-Voice/piper1-gpl, but that fork is GPL-licensed and would require a license review before adoption. Pin here is correct for v1; revisit for v2.
